top_categories.workout_context: Race-pace efforts that mimic Sea Otter Classic Gran Fondo's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before April.
At mile 60 of 90, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
5,500ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
61ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Sea Otter Classic Gran Fondo's paved road through coastal hills and agricultural forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 90 miles.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Sea Otter Classic Gran Fondo. Train it until it feels boring.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 5,500ft of climbing on paved road through coastal hills and agricultural does to your power file on race day.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 90 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
At Sea Otter Classic Gran Fondo, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on paved road through coastal hills and agricultural. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 90 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Tempo is Sea Otter Classic Gran Fondo's race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 90 miles on paved road through coastal hills and agricultural. Train it until it's automatic.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Sea Otter Classic Gran Fondo’s 90 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Race Simulation, Durability, and VO2max to prepare you for 90 miles of paved road through coastal hills and agricultural valley in Monterey, California, USA.
